mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_collection (article_id, user_id, folder_id, status, collect_time, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{folderId}, #{status}, #{collectTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, #{deletedTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_collection WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_collection WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT article_id FROM article_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_collection WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_collection WHERE deleted = 0
